title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 26 November 2021
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 26 November 2021
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 26 November 2021
summary:
Main
The recent downfall in steel prices is an outcome of lack of buying interest from China but we are cautiously optimistic
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2021-11-27_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-26-november-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report-3_8c9a66686093.pdf

hekllenic
SHIP
RECYCLING
REPORT
19th November to 26th November 2021
Hi ghlights of the Week
T he recent downfall in steel prices is an outcome of lack of buying interest
jhh nhu
from China but we are cautiously optimistic that the demand for steel will
remain steady albeit some minor corrections. The demolition market
witnessed softening of about USD 15-20/LDT in all three major subcontinent
ma rkets i.e., India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh as the end users have lowered
the pace of buying due to elevated prices. The existing shortage of units
available for recycling will ensure that prices remain supported in the range
of USD 550-600/LDT.
